chart.expression: WITH dados AS ( SELECT 'PROJB' projeto, TO_DATE('01/2025','MM/YYYY') periodo, 100 valor FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 'PROJB', TO_DATE('02/2025','MM/YYYY'), 200 FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 'PROJB', TO_DATE('03/2025','MM/YYYY'), 450 FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 'PROJB', TO_DATE('04/2025','MM/YYYY'), 300 FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 'PROJC', TO_DATE('01/2025','MM/YYYY'), 400 FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 'PROJC', TO_DATE('02/2025','MM/YYYY'), 300 FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 'PROJC', TO_DATE('03/2025','MM/YYYY'), 900 FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 'PROJC', TO_DATE('04/2025','MM/YYYY'), 100 FROM dual ) SELECT TO_CHAR(periodo,'MM/YYYY') periodo, SUM(CASE WHEN projeto = 'PROJB' THEN valor END) AS PROJB, SUM(CASE WHEN projeto = 'PROJC' THEN valor END) AS PROJC FROM dados GROUP BY periodo ORDER BY periodo
